title: astragalus obcordatus
intro: Astragalus obcordatus, also known as the heart-leaved milk-vetch, is a perennial legume native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus obcordatus include enhancing the immune system, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing stress and fatigue. Astragalus obcordatus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
